name: Cardiff Bay Barrage Circular
dog_lead_policy: On lead on barrage; off-lead in some park sections
highlights: Flat waterfront circuit via Norwegian Church and barrage.
points_of_interest: Norwegian Church; Senedd; Doctor Who Experience (former); Pierhead
picnic_spots: Roald Dahl Plass lawn; Mermaid Quay
food_drink_nearby: Mermaid Quay has dozens: Bill's, Turtle Bay, Cosy Club
